---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest support for new cFS patterns, output formats, or integrations
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use Case

Describe the problem or workflow gap this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like the action to do.

## cFS Version Compatibility

Which cFS versions or configurations does this feature relate to?

- [ ] Draco (current default)
- [ ] Caelum
- [ ] Equuleus
- [ ] EDS-based configurations
- [ ] Custom/proprietary fork
- [ ] All versions

## Example

If applicable, show example header files, workflow configuration, or expected output:

```yaml
- uses: YOUR_USERNAME/cfs-msgid-guard@v1
  with:
    # proposed new input
    new-input: 'value'
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered and why this solution is preferred.

## Additional Context

Any other context, links to cFS documentation, or related issues.
